name: Qinghai Jinrui Mineral Development Co., Ltd
summary: Qinghai Jinrui Mineral Development Co., Ltd produces and sells coal products. It operates through Coal Industry and Chemical Industry segments. The company also offers strontium carbonate, thiourea, sulfur, celestite ore powder, and lapis lazuli, as well as sand, gravel, and pebbles. It primarily operates in Qinghai province, China. The company was formerly known as Mountains in Qinghai Ferroalloy Co., Ltd. Qinghai Jinrui Mineral Development Co., Ltd was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Xining, China.
